music.prompt: Accepted Switchlight audio. Do not regenerate music from this storyboard config.

frames.name: panel-01-mirror-before-the-switch
frames.prompt: Create a horizontal 16:9 hand-drawn director storyboard panel for LUMINA's Switchlight music video. Use the five member references as identity anchors for fictional original idols Rae, Jia, Sena, Nari, and Yumi. Panel 1, WS wide establishing: lyric 'Back door, heartbeat, mirror light'. Rae is at a backstage mirror as calm center, other members appear as layered reflections. Dressing room has dim pearl bulbs, chrome garment rails, black marble counter, and massive negative space. Add dense storyboard annotations: red body arrows for subtle breath, blue camera arrow 'slow push in', orange lighting note 'dim pearl bulbs', green framing note 'mirror depth', purple emotion note 'contained nerves'. Pencil-and-marker production board style, no photoreal final frame, no real celebrity likeness, no copied choreography, no logos, no captions in the scene, no product props.

Add red arrows for jacket snap and shoulder turn, blue note 'handheld drift with her', orange note 'chrome side light', green note 'foreground Jia / mirror Rae / background Nari', purple note 'attitude begins'. Pencil storyboard with colored annotations, no real celebrity likeness, no copied choreography, no logos, no captions in scene, no product props.
